highlights_headline: Preview 3.0.0 was the v3 line that never shipped stable — its work was renumbered and released as 3.116.0.

breaking.title: Obsolete v2 APIs removed
breaking.body: Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2 was removed on this line — the legacy GRContext.Create/GRGlInterface.Assemble* factories, SKBitmap.GetAddr*/Index8 helpers, the InstallPixels overload that took an SKColorTable, and GetRecommendedSampleCount/SetResourceCacheLimits. Migrate to the replacement each obsolete attribute pointed at (CreateGl/CreateOpenGl/GetPixel/GetResourceCacheLimit).

breaking.title: SKFilterQuality replaced by SKSamplingOptions
breaking.body: The v2 SKFilterQuality drawing paths were replaced with SKSamplingOptions in v3, with compatibility overloads that keep SKFilterQuality-based calls compiling.

bullets.detail: Bumps the bundled Skia through milestones 115 and 116.
Exposes SKBlender, the R-tree BeginRecording overload, additional SKPicture APIs, SKImage.ToRawShader, and binds the Skottie Animation.Builder.
Adds Span<T> overloads across color filters, SetRectRadii and GetPixelSpan, and lands new views: SKGLElement for WPF, SKGLView for MAUI, WinUI accelerated views and DPI on the Blazor components.
Rewrites the interop layer around function pointers and LibraryImport for AOT and trimming.
Fixes the SKXamlCanvas XamlRoot lifetime, the Uno Bgra8888 canvas, the WASM canvas lookup, Mac Catalyst Metal and Apple Metal Snapshot returning magenta.
Fixes MAUI view memory leaks, the cloned SKPaint AVE, and the GetKerningPairAdjustments API, and restores the v2.88.8 SKBitmap.Encode PNG behaviour.
Adds .NET 9 support alongside .NET 8, updates SDK/workloads/projects, and refreshes the WinForms GLControl packages.

bullets.lead: Metal on a common TFM and AOT hardening
bullets.detail: Brings the Metal APIs onto a common .NET TFM, updates IBufferByteAccess for AOT, and marks PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable.
Updates HarfBuzz to 8.3.0, libwebp to 1.3.2, and libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: .NET 9 support, the SKXamlCanvas XamlRoot fix, and the Uno canvas context/WASM canvas fixes.
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: Function pointers and LibraryImport interop rewrite, common Metal TFM, and trimmable PlatformConfiguration properties.
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, SetRectRadii Span overload, and the Uno Skia Bgra8888 fix.
contributor_summaries.beto-rodriguez: Exposed DPI on the Blazor components.
contributor_summaries.Fxplorer: Fixed a typo in the README.
contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the access-violation when disposing a cloned SKPaint.
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Restored the v2.88.8 SKBitmap.Encode PNG behaviour.
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed the magenta Snapshot result on Apple Metal.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 modernised the repository, removed the [Obsolete] v2 surface, and refreshed the packaging.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 bound the Skottie Animation.Builder, added SKImage.ToRawShader, and switched Mac Catalyst to Metal.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 brought the Metal APIs onto a common TFM, added SKGLElement for WPF and DPI on the Blazor components.
preview_summaries.p4: Preview 4 added SKBlender, the R-tree BeginRecording overload, more SKPicture APIs, the color-filter Span overloads, and fixed the AVE in cloned SKPaint dispose.
preview_summaries.p5: Preview 5 added .NET 9 support, .NET 8 workload updates, the SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, and fixed MAUI view memory leaks.

harfbuzz_summary: Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.0 and picks up the .NET 9 support and function-pointer interop rewrite in the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
